commands.author: clawsweeper[bot]
commands.review_summary:
The branch updates outbound channel bootstrap and resolution to prefer send-capable runtime plugins from the selected channel registry or active replacement registry, avoid returning setup shells for delivery bootstrap, and adds regression coverage.

PR surface: Source +121, Tests +294. Total +415 across 4 files.

Reproducibility: yes. The source-level reproduction is a pinned setup/channel registry plus a distinct active runtime registry; the source PR also includes live Discord proof, though I did not execute tests during this read-only review.
commands.review_followup: - No ClawSweeper repair job is needed because this review found no narrow actionable defect; normal automerge and exact-head check gates should handle the PR.

target.title: fix(outbound): keep Discord runtime adapters resolvable
